name: collar-adjustment
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, ultrawide close-up shot of a woman's hands adjusting a man's dark mandarin collar uniform, straightening the fabric near the Ascendancy rank insignia — a small metal seal at his collar, the fabric slightly creased from recent mission, warm amber lighting from the left casting soft shadows, caring domestic moment, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh, warm gold tones, tender care, his chin and jaw visible at top of frame, her delicate fingers smoothing the collar fold

name: knuckle-kiss
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, ultrawide medium shot, handsome young man with dark unkempt hair catching a woman's hand as it drops from his collar, pressing his lips to her knuckles in a quick easy kiss, his dark eyes warm with affection, wearing a dark mandarin collar suit with rank insignia visible, she has brunette waves and an expression of fond exasperation melting into a smile, warm amber lighting from behind them creating a soft glow, the gesture casual and practiced — something they've done a thousand times, domestic tenderness, warm intimate atmosphere

name: smiling-response
